scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (issues, projects, users); Jira's write endpoints (issue create/update/transition, comments, attachments) are out of scope for this wave (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented issue creation; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented issue updates; Pass B capability expansion
comments not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
authenticated-user profile introspection, used only by the Check health-check request, not a syncable object stream
